text: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq fall as Samsung, DeepSeek spark chip sell-off and oil rises - Yahoo Finance
fullText: US stocks were mixed on the heels of a record-setting day on Wall Street.

text: Colombia soccer fans invade Vancouver ahead of World Cup Round of 16 clash with Switzerland - Fox News
fullText: Colombian fans turned out in force outside their team's hotel in Vancouver ahead of the Round of 16 match against Switzerland in wild scenes.

text: Le Pen to run for president despite embezzlement conviction - politico.eu
fullText: The French presidential hopeful will appeal the second verdict against her before a higher court.

text: Charlie Kirk murder suspect ate at Chick-fil-A and changed clothes before shooting activist, agent says - CBS News
fullText: An investigator testified that a video shows Tyler Robinson going over a railing onto a rooftop, crouching down and running to a site overlooking where Charlie Kirk was speaking​.

text: ‘Survivor’ star Rick Devens to compete on ‘Big Brother’ season 28 (exclusive) - Entertainment Weekly
fullText: Rick Devens is one of two ‘Survivor’ stars who will be competing on ‘Big Brother’ season 28, Entertainment Weekly has learned. Check out all the details.

text: Trump looms large as Nato grapples with challenge of rearming Europe - BBC
fullText: The US president's inflammatory words have punctuated the image of unity at this crucial gathering, Security Correspondent Frank Gardner writes.

text: Messi saves Argentina in historic World Cup rally past Egypt - ESPN
fullText: Lionel Messi scored in a record sixth straight World Cup knockout match to help Argentina reach the quarterfinals with a stunning late comeback to beat Egypt 3-2 in Atlanta.

text: Android 17 July update rolling out with four Pixel fixes - 9to5Google
fullText: Google is rolling out the first update to Android 17 with the July 2026 security patch for the Pixel 10 Pro, Pixel 10 Pro Fold, and Pixel 10a.

text: Senate GOP leaders say they’ve spoken with Mitch McConnell - Politico
fullText: The longtime former Republican leader has been hospitalized since mid-June while releasing little publicly on his condition.

text: ‘Breathtaking assertion of power’: Appeals court slams door on Florida ‘Stop Woke’ law championed by DeSantis - Politico
fullText: The decision from a divided 2-1 panel of the U.S. Court of Appeals for the 11th Circuit is a devastating, possibly final blow to the so-called Stop WOKE act touted by the DeSantis administration.

text: 6 confirmed cases of cyclosporiasis found in Ionia County as statewide numbers jump to 700 - WLNS 6 News
'Trump Accounts' launch for U.S. kids. Here are savings options in GA - USA Today
fullText: 'Trump Accounts' launched across the U.S. Monday, offering savings accounts for children and babies. Here are other options in Georgia.

text: Deadly Legionnaires' disease outbreak sparks concern in major US city: Know the symptoms - Fox News
fullText: A Legionnaires' disease outbreak on Manhattan's Upper East Side has caused 23 confirmed cases and 17 hospitalizations linked to cooling towers.

text: 6 potential replacements for Graham Platner if he drops out of Senate race - The Washington Post
fullText: The Maine Democrat has faced an escalating string of scandals as he competes for a critical Senate seat that could determine control of the chamber.

text: Google announces Pixel 11 launch event in August - The Verge
fullText: Google is hosting its next Made by Google launch event for Pixel hardware on August 12th in New York City, according to an invitation sent by Google to The Verge. It kicks off at 6PM ET that day.

text: Exclusive: Netanyahu tells CNN he opposes US sale of F-35 jets to Turkey as he downplays divisions with Trump - CNN
fullText: Just hours after President Donald Trump said he’s considering selling F-35 stealth fighter jets to Turkey, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu spoke against the potential move, even as he downplayed divisions between the two world leaders.

text: Mariska Hargitay to Host Emmys; First Woman to Emcee the Show In 15 Years - Variety
fullText: Mariska Hargitay will host the 78th Emmys, which airs live Monday, Sept. 14 on NBC and Peacock. She's the first woman to emcee the show in 15 years.
